item.title: Accessible Multi-Sensor CMM Bridges Skills Gap
item.description: The recent introduction of the VISIUS multi-sensor coordinate measuring machine (CMM) by Hexagon addresses critical challenges facing European manufacturers.

item.title: Hexagon To Expand into NDT with Waygate Technologies Aquisition
item.description: Hexagon AB has announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Waygate Technologies, a leading provider of non-destructive testing solutions, from Baker Hughes.

item.title: Top QMS Trends for 2026: AI, eQMS, Predictive Quality & Industry 4.0
item.description: The landscape of quality management systems (QMS) in manufacturing is undergoing a profound transformation, driven by the imperatives of Industry 4.0, rising product complexity, and the need for greater operational resilience.

item.title: Baker Hughes’ Waygate Technologies, GE Aerospace Drive the Future of Automated Engine Maintenance
item.description: The automated MDI templates represent the latest developments through an ongoing Joint Technology Development Agreement (JTDA) between the two companies that began in 2023.

item.title: Compact 3D Scanners Target GD&T-Driven Inspection Demands
item.description: The system combines updated optics with revised processing algorithms to achieve a stated accuracy of 0.015 mm.

item.title: Dark to Reflective Surfaces Measured Accurately with Wenglor P1PC
item.description: The P1PC series excels in stable object detection and high repeatability, delivering consistent measurements regardless of object color

item.title: InnovMetric Announces Acquisition of Digisens’ Intellectual Property
item.description: InnovMetric, a leading provider of 3D metrology solutions for the manufacturing industry, announced it has acquired the intellectual property of French company Digisens.
